# Make It So Camp

> Make It So Camp is a selective two-day AI workshop, by invitation. Day 1 you make your working method explicit; Day 2 you build with others and demo. Tokyo and Adelaide, 2026.

## Pages

- [/](https://misocamp.com/): The idea, who it's for, how it works, and the 2026 camps. Thesis: you cannot delegate what you cannot articulate.
- [Tokyo](https://misocamp.com/tokyo/): Tokyo camp, 24-25 August 2026 at Crypto Cafe Tokyo, in collaboration with Chiba Institute of Technology.
- [Adelaide](https://misocamp.com/adelaide/): Adelaide camp, 17-18 September 2026, venue to be announced, in collaboration with Flinders University New Venture Institute and SA Futures Agency.
- [About](https://misocamp.com/about/): The founders, Igor Schwarzmann and Noah Raford, and the camp collaborators.

## Optional

- [Full site content as markdown](https://misocamp.com/llms-full.txt): the complete site transcribed as clean markdown for language models.

## Contact

Email-only: hello@misocamp.com. By invitation; request one by telling us which camp, what work you would bring, and why now.
